testcase.name: contextLoads

16:32:40.332 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.pm.gateway.ApiGatewayApplicationTests]: ApiGatewayApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 16:32:40.419 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.pm.gateway.ApiGatewayApplication for test class com.pm.gateway.ApiGatewayApplicationTests
